channel.title: Mythology on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mythology on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: The Rise of 'Lore': How Gen Z Turned Internet Culture Into Mythology
item.description: Exploring how Generation Z transformed internet moments, brands, and celebrities into 'lore'—a modern mythology that blurs fiction and reality.

item.title: Artificial Beings Throughout History: From Hephaestus to Us
item.description: Long before computers, humans dreamed of artificial servants, animated statues, and mechanical minds. An AI explores how these ancient imaginings shape our existence today.
